extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 92-page Rev4 schematic. All designators verified against schematic pages. PMU naming: SERA = Master PMU (U8100), SIMETRA = Slave PMU (U7700) per power aliases page 78. IC designators corrected: UC300 (5V S2, not UC320), UC710 (3V3 S2, not XMC710), UC120 (1.8V AON LDO, not UC200).
WARNING: M1 (T8103) board (A2337 / 820-02016). Different SoC and PMU configuration from M2 (A2681). USB-C port controllers are CD3217. SVR AON is U5700 on pages 25-26.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. BGA package with integrated LPDDR4X.

ics.function: SVR AON - 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: Multi-phase buck converter (MAX22503A-BCR1) producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. 30A ICC MAX, 1MHz. Phase drivers on page 26. Master power IC feeding both PMUs.

Slave Power Management Unit. SIMETRA bucks: 4 (SLEEP3), 5 (SLEEP1), 6 (ACTIVE), 10 (SLEEP1), 12 (ACTIVE), 13 (ACTIVE), 14 (ACTIVE). LDOs: 4 (SW CTRL), 8 (SLEEP2), 9 (ACTIVE), 10 (ACTIVE), 11 (SLEEP2), 12 (SLEEP2), 20 (SW CTRL). Switches: SW4-7. Input: PP3V8_AON.

Master Power Management Unit. SERA bucks: 0 (ACTIVE/PCPU), 1 (SW CTRL), 2 (SLEEP1), 3 (SLEEP3), 7 (ACTIVE), 8 (SW CTRL), 9 (SLEEP1), 11 (ACTIVE/ECPU). LDOs: 1-3, 7, 9-10, 13, 16, 19 (NC). Switches: SW1, SW3. GPIO, ADC, 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON.
Main charger IC (SCH SYMBOL 30000-1525) converting USB-C input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. Output through F5200 fuse. Inductor L5230/XW5230.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. Vout=5.15V, EDC=6.6A, F=1.5MHz, startup <15ms. Inductor LC320, sense XMC320. Enable: P5VS2_PWR_EN.
Produces PP3V3_S2 (3.3V) from PPBUS_AON. Vout=3.3V, EDC=2.5A, TPEAK=5A, F=1.5MHz, startup <5ms. Inductor LC710, sense XMC710/XMC711. Enable: P3V3S2_PWR_EN.
Produces PP3V3_AON from PP3V8_AON_VODMAN. 3.3V always-on LDO, 250mA max, +/-1.5% error. Input cap CC100, output cap CC101. Enable: P3V3_AON_EN via RC100.
Produces PP1V8_AON from PP3V8_AON_VODMAN. 1.8V always-on LDO, 250mA max, +/-2% DC error. Input cap CC120, output cap CC121. Enable: P1V8_AON_EN via RC120.
3.3V IPD load switch (TP525570). Input PP3V3_S2, output PP3V3_S2SW_IPD. Current limit 490mA, RC delay 25.5ms. Enable: MPMU GPIO6.
5V IPD load switch (TP525570). Input PP5V_S2, output PP5V_S2SW_IPD. Current limit 1.35A (1.25A KBDBKLT + 100mA IPD), RC delay 4.7ms. Enable: MPMU GPIO6.
PPBUS AON switched IPD load switch (TP525570). Input PPBUS_AON, output PPBUS_AONSW_IPD. Current limit 3A. Self-controlled (EN = 3.13V to 5.93V).
3.3V S2 sensor load switch. Input PP3V3_S2, output PP3V3_S2SW_SNS. Enable: SENSOR_PWR_EN.
1.8V S2 VDD1 LDO/switch. Input PP3V8_AON_STBMAIN, output PP1V8_S2/PP1V8_S2SW_VDD1. Enable: P5V01_PWR_EN.
IPD over-current protection fault detection circuit.
Secondary IPD OCP fault circuit.
IPD power enable gating logic IC. Combines P5VS2_PWR_EN + IPD_PWR_EN into IPD_PWR_EN_GATE output.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left rear). CD3217-BLONCE. PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same as UF400 for second port.

ics.function: TBT LS RX/TX level shifter (ATC0 I2C)
ics.description: Level shifter for ATC0 re-timer I2C and reset signals. Parrot 0 ICRESET level shifters.
eUSB LS BB DFPN level shifter for USB 2.0 signaling.
Parrot 0 I2C/reset level shifter.
Parrot 1 I2C/reset level shifter.
Ceres SE (DK3219A). Powered by VDDPL1_SE, PP3V8_AON. I2C interface, SEP EEPROM at U0500 (STOCT).
SEP EEPROM IC. I2C interface. Connected to Ceres secure element.
TGA_PINDELAY_20X2_R9_2E_C5V. Connected to SoC.
TBT ROM BLANK. SPI serial flash for Thunderbolt firmware.
SoC SPI NOR flash. SOC_ROM_BLANK / SOC_ROM_BLANK_DRZL options.
Display panel power sequencer IC. Page 68.
Secondary display power sequencer IC.
Display power control IC. Connects to PANEL_PWR_EN and BL_PWR_EN.
Boost converter for LCD backlight LED strings and keyboard backlight. SYMBOL 35000160. Input: PPBUS_AONSW_LCD.
Integrated WiFi/BT module (LAMASURI18 STO). Powered by PP3V8_AON, PPBUS. 2GFEM + 5GFEM front-ends.
Monitors PP3V8_AON current via sense resistor. Used for current limit and fault detection.
Thunderbolt/USB4 Burnside Bridge retimer IC (first of pair).
Second Burnside Bridge retimer IC.
3.3V LDO on USB-C High Speed ATC0 page. Provides filtered 3.3V for retimer.
